title: Vehicles
subtitle: Vehicles, costs, deadlines and documents in one place.

photos.title: Vehicle photos
photos.hint: Choose a cover photo for the cockpit, vehicle switcher and vehicle cards.
photos.formats: JPEG, PNG or WebP up to 12 MB

overview.costTrendHint: Monthly trend compared with the previous period
overview.noActivity: No activity in this period yet.

fuelStatus.question: Was the tank full after refuelling up to the automatic nozzle stop?
fuelStatus.fullHint: The tank was genuinely full after refuelling.
fuelStatus.partialHint: The tank was only filled part of the way.
fuelStatus.unknownHint: The level after refuelling is not known reliably.
fuelStatus.explanation: A tank that was half or quarter full beforehand is not a problem if it was completely filled afterwards. Only confirmed full tanks close a consumption segment.

analytics.costMixHint: Category share of the total amount
analytics.noFullAnchorHint: Record a genuine full tank. It becomes the starting point for the next calculation.
analytics.waitingForFullHint: The next confirmed full tank will close the first consumption segment.
analytics.rankingHint: Total costs in the selected period
analytics.noDataHint: New entries will appear in the chart automatically.

ledger.hint: Up to 20 entries from the selected filter.

serviceChecklist.noPositions: No individual line items were saved for this service.

fuelImports.pendingHint: Select a vehicle and briefly review the detected details.
fuelImports.inboxHint: These budget entries were detected as fuel and have not yet been assigned to a vehicle.
fuelImports.vehicleRequired: Select a vehicle for the fuel receipt.
fuelImports.assignError: The fuel receipt could not be assigned.
fuelImports.ignoreError: The fuel receipt could not be ignored.
fuelImports.rescanError: The fuel receipts could not be checked again.
fuelImports.reportHint: Budget entries, invoices and existing refuellings were reconciled.
fuelImports.reportDetails: {{repaired}} orphaned imports repaired; {{archived}} archived and {{foreign}} receipts from other households were not imported.
fuelImports.reactivateError: The fuel receipt could not be reactivated.
fuelImports.deleteSourceChoice: Should the linked budget receipt also be ignored permanently? OK = ignore, Cancel = offer it for assignment again.
fuelImports.deleteError: The refuelling could not be deleted.

analysis.title: Analyse service document with AI
analysis.uploadTitle: Select a service invoice or workshop document
analysis.uploadHint: PDF, JPEG, PNG or WebP. You will review the result before saving.
analysis.runningHint: Reading text, line items, vehicle details and maintenance notes.
analysis.createInvoice: Also save as a general invoice
analysis.sumDifference: The line-item total differs from the gross amount by EUR {{value}}.

errors.analyse: The document could not be analysed.
errors.cleanup: The temporary document could not be deleted.
errors.required: Vehicle and invoice date are required.
errors.save: The service could not be saved.
